text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
1,600 meters... That's the same distance as the
Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(But now, I know I can display my true ability.
Mine, and not someone else's.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer and I have been working hard to make
sure I can utilize my body's strength to the fullest.
As long as I can use what I've learned...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'm sure I can run better than I did at the Oka
Sho! And then...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I can show Trainer an even brighter future!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: All right! I can do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower gets changed, and we head to the
paddock.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
She does... I'm glad I didn't break her
concentration.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I need to focus as well. I won't be able to do my
best for all 1,600 meters of this race if I'm
distracted.
